_meta.description: Reference latitude/longitude for Atlanta-metro landmarks used as ML feature anchors (haversine distance to landmark).
_meta.purpose: Feature engineering for the Yardi rent prediction model. Use with rent EDA dataset to compute dist_buckhead, dist_midtown, dist_downtown, dist_airport.
_meta.units: decimal degrees (lat positive N, lng negative W in this region)

buckhead.name: Buckhead
buckhead.notes: Northern uptown business district; high-end residential and commercial core.

midtown.name: Midtown Atlanta
midtown.notes: High-density commercial/residential corridor along Peachtree St between North Ave and 17th St.

downtown.name: Downtown Atlanta
downtown.notes: Central business district; Five Points / Peachtree Center / GSU.

atl_airport.name: Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport (ATL)
atl_airport.source: FAA airport reference point; confirmed via Wikipedia / latlong.net
atl_airport.notes: Largest US employment node south of downtown; commute proximity affects rent pricing.
